ValidationRule.description: The invoice Status "Sent" can not be set because Abacus Transfer is not selected.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, ISPICKVAL(InvoiceStatus__c ,"Sent"), RecordType.DeveloperName <> "ILV", OR( ISBLANK( AbacusTransfer__c ), AbacusInterfaceExport__c = false ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The invoice Status "Sent" can not be set because Abacus Transfer / Abacus Interface Export ist not correct. (IN007)
